RELIANCE.NS.subtitle: India's largest conglomerate — energy, retail, telecom, media & finance under one umbrella.

divisions.name: Reliance Retail
divisions.desc: India's largest retailer. Reliance Digital, Reliance Trends, Smart Bazaar, JioMart. Revenue ~₹3.3L Cr annually.

divisions.name: Reliance Jio
divisions.desc: India's largest 5G telecom. JioFiber, JioAirFiber, Jio Platforms — backed by Google, Meta, KKR.

divisions.name: O2C (Oil-to-Chemicals)
divisions.desc: World's largest refinery complex at Jamnagar. Fuels, petrochemicals, polyester, specialty chemicals.

divisions.name: New Energy
divisions.desc: Solar, green hydrogen, battery storage. Dhirubhai Ambani Green Energy Giga Complex in Jamnagar.

divisions.name: Media & Entertainment
divisions.desc: Network18, TV18, CNBC-TV18. JioCinema + Hotstar merged under $8.5B JV with Disney (completed Nov 2024). Streams IPL, FIFA, OTT.

TMCV.NS.subtitle: India's oldest and most diversified conglomerate — 100+ countries, 30+ industries.

divisions.name: Jaguar Land Rover
divisions.desc: UK premium brand. Defender, Discovery, Range Rover, Jaguar. FY2025 revenue £29B — best PBT in a decade.

divisions.name: Tata EV
divisions.desc: Nexon EV, Tiago EV, Punch EV, Harrier EV. ~40% of India's EV market. Dedicated gigafactory planned.

divisions.name: Air India
divisions.desc: India's national carrier. Vistara merger complete. 570 aircraft ordered + $400M fleet retrofit (Vihaan.AI).

divisions.name: Tata Electronics
divisions.desc: Assembles iPhones for Apple. Also building a $11B semiconductor fab in Gujarat.

TCS.NS.subtitle: TCS is the Tata Group's IT flagship — a global leader in digital transformation and AI services.

divisions.name: TCS BaNCS
divisions.desc: World's leading banking software suite. 450+ financial institutions, 80+ countries, trillions in daily transactions.

divisions.name: Ignio (AI)
divisions.desc: Cognitive automation platform. Competing with ServiceNow and BMC in AIOps space.

divisions.name: TCS iON
divisions.desc: Assessment platform. Runs 10M+ exam seats annually for UPSC, Railways, and large corporates.

divisions.name: Quartz (Blockchain)
divisions.desc: Enterprise blockchain-as-a-service for supply chain, trade finance, digital identity.

HDFCBANK.NS.subtitle: India's largest private bank by assets, merged with HDFC Ltd. Full-stack financial services.

divisions.name: HDFC Securities
divisions.desc: Full-service brokerage for equity, derivatives, currency, mutual funds. Integrated with HDFC Bank.

divisions.name: HDB Financial Services
divisions.desc: Personal loans, business loans, BPO. AUM ₹95,000+ Cr. Highly anticipated IPO in pipeline.

divisions.name: HDFC Bank (Core)
divisions.desc: 8,700+ branches, 20,000+ ATMs. Net NPA consistently below 0.4%.
